title: Part 2 – Entraînement 1 : questions What / Where / Who
instructions: Écoutez chaque question et les trois réponses. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.

items.audioText: What time does the office open on Mondays? (A) At eight thirty in the morning. (B) On the second floor. (C) Yes, it's open today.
choices: At eight thirty in the morning.
items.explanation: "What time" attend une heure. (A) la donne. (B) répond à "Where", (C) à une question oui/non.

items.audioText: Where should I send the invoice? (A) It arrived yesterday. (B) To the accounts payable department. (C) The invoice was incorrect.
items.explanation: "Where should I send" demande un lieu de destination. (B) le donne précisément.

items.audioText: Who approved the new marketing strategy? (A) It's a very effective strategy. (B) The director approved it last week. (C) We use several marketing channels.
choices: The director approved it last week.
items.explanation: "Who approved" demande une personne. (B) identifie le directeur.

items.audioText: What is the deadline for submitting the project report? (A) The report is very detailed. (B) It needs to be submitted by Friday. (C) I'll work on it tomorrow.
choices: It needs to be submitted by Friday.
items.explanation: "What is the deadline" demande une date ou période. (B) répond directement.

items.audioText: Where is the nearest ATM? (A) I usually pay by card. (B) There's one just around the corner. (C) The bank closes at five.
choices: There's one just around the corner.
items.explanation: "Where is the nearest" demande un lieu. (B) donne une localisation précise.

items.audioText: Who will be presenting at the conference? (A) The conference is in Lyon. (B) Dr. Martin from the research team. (C) It starts at nine o'clock.
choices: Dr. Martin from the research team.
items.explanation: "Who will be presenting" demande un nom. (B) identifie Dr. Martin.

items.audioText: What did the client say about the proposal? (A) The proposal is on my desk. (B) She said she was very impressed. (C) I'll send it by email.
choices: The proposal is on my desk.
She said she was very impressed.
items.explanation: "What did the client say" demande le contenu de ce qui a été dit. (B) rapporte les propos.

items.audioText: Where do I pick up my visitor badge? (A) Visitors must sign in first. (B) At the reception desk on the ground floor. (C) The security office is on the left.
choices: At the reception desk on the ground floor.
The security office is on the left.
items.explanation: "Where do I pick up" demande un lieu précis. (B) indique l'accueil au rez-de-chaussée.

items.audioText: What are the main topics for today's meeting? (A) The meeting room is booked until noon. (B) Budget review and project updates. (C) We meet every Tuesday morning.
choices: The meeting room is booked until noon.
items.explanation: "What are the main topics" demande le contenu de l'ordre du jour. (B) liste les sujets.

items.audioText: Who handles IT support requests in this office? (A) Our IT system is very reliable. (B) You can submit a ticket to the helpdesk. (C) The IT office is on the fourth floor.
choices: Our IT system is very reliable.
You can submit a ticket to the helpdesk.
The IT office is on the fourth floor.
items.explanation: "Who handles" attend une indication de personne ou service. (B) indique la procédure via le helpdesk.
